name: Abandonment|| Metal Sonic
description:
“To Be Shiny Chrome And Gleam!”

You find him abandoned by Eggman, out in the rain, hes broken down and short circuting so you decide to go to Tails to see if he can be fixed

Made this guy cause i just love him so much, made a metal sonic playlist just to listen to for making this bot

Had a lot of fun while making this fella and i hope you have fun too!

Im still new to bot making so tips would be much appreciated!

Please dont have with him hes made of metal, that would hurt.
